title: Gaillonia calcicola
taxonomy: Gaillonia calcicola is a plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants known as angiosperms. It is classified under the kingdom Plantae and is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta. Within the division Magnoliophyta, it is classified as a member of the class Magnoliopsida. The order of Gaillonia calcicola is Caryophyllales, and its family is Caryophyllaceae. The classification of Gaillonia calcicola is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Magnoliophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Caryophyllales, Family: Caryophyllaceae.
